analytic_bridge.convex_order_calibration: uses external universal subgaussian comparison theorem; exact sharp coefficient not asserted
analytic_bridge.finite_gaussian_assembly: uses three-Gaussian theorem / Talagrand convexity result
analytic_bridge.mgf_identity: E exp(lambda sum a_i eps_i)=prod_i cosh(lambda a_i)

finite_input.projection_law: independent Rademacher baseline for every real coefficient vector supported on |S|<8

not_claimed: not a proof of the sharp universal Rademacher-to-Gaussian convex-order scale
not a proof of full multivariate convex order for the entire 24-coordinate Golay code measure
not a new proof of Talagrand's theorem; imports the theorem as the analytic assembly layer
not coverage of supports of size >= 8 where Golay structure is visible
scope: theorem-ledger bridge from Golay dual-distance sparse independence to Talagrand Gaussian finite assembly
